search.title: سلام
search.snippet: Mazanderani: سلام (selâm) → Nepali: सलाम (salām) → Punjabi: ਸਲਾਮ (salām) → Pashto: سلام (salām) → Sindhi: (salāmu) Arabic script: سَلامُ (salāmu) Devanagari

search.title: سلام کردن
search.snippet: From سلام (salâm, “greeting, salute”) +‎ کردن (kardan, “to do”). سلام کردن • (salâm kardan) to greet to salute

search.title: لال سلام
search.snippet: لَال (lāl) +‎ سلام. An allusion to red being the color of communism. لال سَلام • (lāl salām) (Hindi spelling लाल सलाम) (among communists) hello, greetings

search.title: سلام عليكم
search.snippet: Arabic phrasebook Arabic Wikipedia has an article on: سلام عليكم Wikipedia ar Compare Hebrew שָׁלוֹם עֲלֵיכֶם (šalṓm ʿaleiḵém), Aramaic ܫܠܵܡܵܐ ܥܲܠܵܘܟ݂ܘܿܢ

search.title: سلام دعا
search.snippet: From سَلام (salām, “hello; peace”) +‎ دُعا (du'ā, “prayer; supplication”). (Standard Urdu) IPA(key): /sə.lɑːm d̪ʊ.(ʔ)ɑː/ سَلام دُعا • (salām du'ā) m (indeclinable

search.title: سلام علیکم
search.snippet: Persian Wikipedia has an article on: سلام علیکم Wikipedia fa Borrowed from Arabic سَلَام عَلَيْكُم (salām ʕalaykum). (Classical Persian) IPA(key): /sa

search.title: सलामु
search.snippet: Persian سلام (salām), from Arabic سَلَام (salām). सलामु • (salāmu) (Perso-Arabic سلام) (used by Muslims) hello, hi सलामु • (salāmu) m (Perso-Arabic سلام) peace;

search.title: सलाम
search.snippet: from Classical Persian سلام (salām), from Arabic سَلَام (salām). Compare Punjabi ਸਲਾਮ (salām) / سَلام (salām), Sindhi سَلامُ (salāmu) / सलामु, Gujarati
